SignalGateCommand.docs: CQRS command for the signal-gate chain-sequencing use case. Carries the gate label, items directory, and active track id. Created pre-baseline; action add.

SignalGateOutput.docs: Output DTO for the signal-gate use case. Aggregated result of the 4-chain sequencing. Consumed by cli_driver render layer.

SignalChainOutput.docs: Per-chain output DTO inside a signal-gate run. One entry per SoT-chain evaluated. `stdout`/`stderr` are opaque output strings produced by the chain verifier; they are free-text and not domain-constrained (docs justify raw String per R9).

SignalGateError.docs: Error type for the SignalGateService. ChainExecutionFailed: one chain verifier returned an error. InvalidTrackId: track id could not be resolved. StrictnessConfigLoad: signal-gates config could not be loaded.

SignalGateInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing SignalGateService. Holds the injected SignalLayerReader port, SignalGateMatrix strictness source, and chain-runner ports (AdrChainRunnerPort, SpecAdrChainRunnerPort, LayerChainRunnerPort) as private fields. Sequences the 4 SoT chains (adr-user, spec-adr, catalog-spec, impl-catalog), resolves strictness per gate matrix, and aggregates results.

SpecAdrSignalCommand.docs: CQRS command for the spec-ADR signal calculation use case. Carries the path to the spec.json to be read, evaluated, and re-written.

SpecAdrSignalOutput.docs: Output DTO for the spec-ADR signal calculation use case. Returns the aggregate blue/yellow/red signal counts after writing the updated spec.json. Counts are unsigned integers; they are truly opaque counters with no domain constraints beyond non-negativity (R9: u32 justified as domain-agnostic counter value).

SpecAdrSignalError.docs: Error type for the SpecAdrSignalService. All variants carry String payloads for usecase purity (no std::io::Error). Read: I/O failure reading spec.json. Decode: JSON/domain decode failure. Encode: encode failure. Write: atomic-write failure. Infrastructure adapter maps concrete errors to String at the boundary.

ArchivedTrackTelemetryError.docs: Error type for ArchivedTrackTelemetryPort. Single variant EmitUnavailable(String) wraps any infrastructure failure (filesystem write, JSON serialization, etc.) as a human-readable message converted at the adapter boundary.

ArchivedTrackTelemetryCommand.docs: CQRS command for the archived-track telemetry use case. `subcommand` is an opaque CLI subcommand label recorded as free text; it is not a domain value object. `track_id`, `exit_code`, and `duration_ms` are recorded in the canonical TelemetryEvent::TrackSubcommand fields so archived JSONL rows can be deserialized by TelemetryReport::aggregate alongside active-track events (matching duration metrics).

ArchivedTrackTelemetryInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing ArchivedTrackTelemetryService. Holds the injected ArchivedTrackTelemetryPort as a private field and delegates telemetry persistence through that secondary port, keeping cli_driver from invoking infrastructure adapters directly.

SpecAdrSignalInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing SpecAdrSignalService. Holds injected file ports as private fields. Executes the read-domain-document->evaluate->set->write-domain-document cycle for spec-ADR signal persistence; JSON decode/encode stays inside the SpecFileWriterPort adapter, extracted from cli_composition per ADR 1328 D4.

D4OrchestrationError.docs: Shared error type for the D4 orchestration extraction services added by this track. String payloads are opaque diagnostic text mapped at the usecase boundary and rendered by cli_driver; they are not domain value objects.

DryFragmentPipelineCommand.docs: CQRS command for the D4 diff-fragment pipeline used by the fixpoint dry gate. `canonical_root` is the project root used for fragment extraction; `repo_root` is the git repository root used for explicit diff discovery and path normalization; `base` is the diff base commit. The interactor receives `repo_root` explicitly and does not require caller CWD changes.

DryFragmentPipelineOutput.docs: Output DTO for the D4 dry fragment pipeline. Carries derived FragmentRefs as a BTreeSet plus legacy records_* compatibility fields. For this service the records_* fields are fixed at 0; record-count aggregation remains in the dry_write path.

DryFragmentPipelineInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing DryFragmentPipelineService. Extracts the build_current_fragment_refs multi-step orchestration from cli_composition into usecase application logic. The dry_check_approved code path retains only a small one-line loop that calls the usecase free function `fragment_ref_of` per fragment — that is a single-step usecase API call, not multi-step orchestration, so it remains in cli_composition by design. The broader dry-gate orchestration (the dry-gate enabled/disabled branching in fixpoint_resolve) is tracked by T008. dry_write record-count aggregation stays in the dry-write path; DryFragmentPipelineOutput records_* counters remain 0 for catalogue compatibility. Private dependencies use the dry-check diff source and the new CodeFragmentExtractorPort; CodeFragmentExtractorAdapter is the infrastructure adapter edge for fragment extraction.

FixpointDryGateCommand.docs: CQRS command for the D4 fixpoint-resolve dry-gate orchestration. Carries the validated path trio (track directory, canonical project root, git repository root) and the usecase dry-check configuration. The CLI composition layer resolves all five values before calling FixpointDryGateService::resolve_dry_gate.

FixpointDryGateOutput.docs: Usecase-owned dry-gate resolution bundle returned by FixpointDryGateService. This is intentionally not a DTO: it carries the current fragment refs, the approval service dependency ready for injection into FixpointResolveInteractor, and the approval workspace root. When dry_config.enabled is false the gate is bypassed: current_fragment_refs is empty and dry_approval is a NoOpDryApprovalService.

FixpointDryGateInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing FixpointDryGateService. Owns dry-gate branching, diff-base and corpus metadata sequencing through injected ports, fragment-pipeline delegation, and DryCheckApprovalInteractor construction. The CWD guard remains in the cli_composition caller; repo_root is passed explicitly so std::env state is not owned by the usecase layer.

PrReviewPollingCommand.docs: CQRS command for the D4 PR review polling application service. `pr` is the PR number string; `repo_nwo` is pre-resolved by the caller; `trigger_timestamp` is RFC 3339; `max_iterations` replaces std::time::Instant for deadline tracking (usecase purity); `head_commit` enables commit-based timeout recovery and zero-findings detection.

PrReviewPollingOutput.docs: Outcome variants for a single D4 PR review polling cycle. ReviewFound: a qualifying Codex bot review was found (the latest by submitted_at). ZeroFindings: zero-findings signal detected via bot +1 reaction or comment text fallback. Timeout: the polling deadline (max_iterations) was reached without finding a qualifying review.

PrReviewPollingInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing PrReviewPollingService. Extracts the PR review polling loop from cli_composition into a usecase application service with injected review-provider ports.

HookDispatchCommand.docs: CQRS command for the hook dispatch use case. Carries raw tool_name, optional command, file_path, content from the Claude Code hook JSON envelope, and positional git hook arguments (for git-ref-update / git-pre-push final notification routing).

HookVerdictDecision.docs: Enum representing the hook verdict outcome at the usecase boundary. Mirrors domain::hook::HookVerdict without exposing the domain type.

HookVerdictOutput.docs: DTO returned by the hook dispatch service to the CLI. Wraps the verdict outcome without exposing domain::hook::HookVerdict across the usecase boundary. skill_compliance_output carries the rendered UserPromptSubmit JSON when the skill-compliance hook produced guidance.

HookDispatchError.docs: Error type for HookDispatchService. Wraps unknown hook name and handler execution failures without leaking domain::hook::HookError.

HookDispatchInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing HookDispatchService. Delegates each tool call to the appropriate domain hook handler.

VerifyOutcome.docs: Outcome of a single verify subcommand. Contains stdout, stderr, and exit_code.

VerifyIndexResult.docs: Result of verifying the convention README index. ok is false when findings are present.

DemoInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing DemoService by delegating to the injected DemoPort.

DryWriteDriverInput.docs: Input for sotp dry write (driver boundary).

DryResultsDriverInput.docs: Input for sotp dry results (driver boundary).

DryCheckApprovedDriverInput.docs: Input for sotp dry check-approved (driver boundary).

DryFixLocalDriverInput.docs: Input for sotp dry fix-local (driver boundary).

DryDriverOutcome.docs: Unified command outcome returned to the dry driver. Mirrors cli_driver::render::CommandOutcome without importing cli_driver.

DryDriverInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing DryDriverService. It may use DryDriverPort for external effects, but T023 must keep the dry command path, including dry_fix_local, in usecase-owned service logic rather than delegating back to DryCompositionRoot or DryFixRunnerCompositionRoot.

IndexBuildDriverInput.docs: Input for sotp dup-index build (driver boundary).

IndexMeasureQualityDriverInput.docs: Input for sotp dup-index measure-quality (driver boundary).

SemanticDupDriverOutcome.docs: Unified command outcome returned to the semantic_dup driver. Mirrors cli_driver::render::CommandOutcome without importing cli_driver.

SemanticDupDriverInteractor.docs: Interactor implementing SemanticDupDriverService. It may use SemanticDupDriverPort for external effects, but T023 must keep the semantic_dup command path in usecase-owned service logic rather than delegating back to SemanticDupCompositionRoot.

SignalCommandOutput.docs: Unified output DTO for all signal subcommands. Mirrors cli_driver::render::CommandOutcome field-for-field.

SignalGateName.docs: Selects the gate context when resolving strictness from signal-gates.json. Re-defined in usecase so cli_driver does not import domain directly.

TelemetryPhaseDuration.docs: Report record for a single telemetry phase duration.

TelemetryErrorEntry.docs: A single error entry from telemetry.

TelemetryHookBlockEntry.docs: A single hook block entry from telemetry.

TelemetryReportOutput.docs: Aggregated telemetry output for a track.

TelemetryReportError.docs: Error type for TelemetryReportPort. TrackNotFound: track directory does not exist. ReportUnavailable: report could not be loaded.

PrCommandOutput.docs: Primitive output from a PR command operation. Uses only stdlib types so the driver and usecase layers never import infrastructure or domain types.

PrCommandInteractor.docs: Function bundle injected by cli_composition to implement PrCommandService. Uses function-pointer pattern so usecase never imports infrastructure directly.

CheckApprovedOutcome.docs: Outcome of the check-approved gate. NoPairs: no production reference pairs found. AllApproved: all pairs have Pass cache entries. NotApproved: one or more pairs lack a Pass entry.

RefVerifyCheckApprovedInteractor.docs: Default RefVerifyCheckApprovedService implementation. Loads production pairs and reads per-scope verify-cache artifacts to verify all pairs are Pass.

RefVerifyDriverError.docs: Failure modes for RefVerifyRunService and RefVerifyCheckApprovedDriverService.

RefVerifyRunOutcome.docs: Outcome of the ref-verify run operation, ready for driver rendering.

RefVerifyCheckApprovedOutcome.docs: Outcome of the ref-verify check-approved operation, ready for driver rendering.

ReviewRunInput.docs: Input for the RunCodex / RunClaude review variants.

ReviewRunFixInput.docs: Input for the RunFixLocal review variant.

RunReviewFixOutput.docs: DTO returned by ReviewService::run_fix_local — the usecase aggregate service method that orchestrates the review-fix-lead runner. `status` carries the sentinel string from the codex output (`completed` | `blocked_cross_scope` | `failed`). `exit_code` maps the sentinel to a CLI exit code (0=completed, 2=blocked_cross_scope, 1=failed). `stderr` carries diagnostic detail (e.g., smoke-test failure message) to surface on stderr when the run is blocked or failed; `None` when the run completed successfully.

RunReviewOutput.docs: DTO returned by ReviewService::run_codex and ReviewService::run_claude — the usecase application service methods that orchestrate the reviewer subprocess. `verdict_kind` is the stringified verdict (`approved` / `rejected` / etc) without leaking domain ReviewOutcome. `skipped` indicates whether the run was skipped (e.g., empty scope). `finding_count` is the reviewer's finding tally. `summary` is the rendered review output. `exit_code` preserves the underlying reviewer subprocess CLI exit code so the contract `findings_remain → exit 2` survives the cli_driver boundary (distinguishing review findings from execution failures).

RunReviewError.docs: Error type returned by ReviewService::run_codex and ReviewService::run_claude. InvalidTrackId and InvalidGroupName cover argument validation failures; CompositionFailed and ReviewerFailed wrap wiring or reviewer subprocess failures without leaking lower-layer types.

RunReviewFixError.docs: Error type returned by ReviewService::run_fix_local. InvalidScope, InvalidTrackId, and InvalidRoundType cover argument validation failures; SmokeTestFailed covers fixer preflight failures; FixRunnerFailed wraps runner failures without leaking infrastructure types.

ReviewRunLocalOutput.docs: Output DTO from ReviewRunLocalService. Uses stdlib-only types so cli_driver never imports domain or infrastructure review types.

TrackCommandOutput.docs: Unified output DTO for all track subcommands. Mirrors cli_driver::render::CommandOutcome field-for-field.

GitWorkflowError.docs: Error type for GitWorkflowService and git workflow validation helpers. Unavailable variant added by T026 typed-error refactor to represent I/O or infrastructure failures (git process errors, file read failures) previously expressed as plain String at the boundary.

TelemetryEmitDynamicPortError.docs: Error type for TelemetryEmitDynamicPort. EmitUnavailable: resolution or I/O failure when emitting the archived-track telemetry event. Replaces plain String error for typed usecase boundary.

TelemetryAggregateServiceError.docs: Error type for TelemetryAggregateService. ReportUnavailable: report could not be produced (track not found or I/O failure). EmitUnavailable: archived-track telemetry event could not be emitted. Replaces plain String error for typed usecase boundary.

GitWorkflowInteractor.docs: Concrete interactor wrapper over the GitWorkflowService secondary port. Holds an injected Arc<dyn GitWorkflowService> and delegates every method through it, enabling composition to wrap FsGitWorkflowAdapter without classifying the filesystem adapter as an application service.

ArchPortError.docs: Error returned by ArchPort methods when the infrastructure layer cannot fulfill the request. Derives Debug via #[derive(Debug)] and Display + Error via thiserror::Error.

ConventionsPortError.docs: Error returned by ConventionsPort methods when the infrastructure layer cannot fulfill the request. Derives Debug via #[derive(Debug)] and Display + Error via thiserror::Error.

DemoPortError.docs: Error returned by DemoPort methods when the infrastructure layer cannot fulfill the request. Derives Debug via #[derive(Debug)] and Display + Error via thiserror::Error.

FilePortError.docs: Error returned by FileWritePort methods on I/O failure. Derives Debug via #[derive(Debug)] and Display + Error via thiserror::Error.

ExportSchemaCommand.docs: CQRS command for the schema export use case extracted from cli into the usecase application service. Carries the inputs the CLI passes when invoking the service.

ExportSchemaError.docs: Error type for ExportSchemaService. Added FileWriteFailed variant to cover atomic file write failures via FileWritePort.

ExportSchemaInteractor.docs: Concrete implementation of ExportSchemaService. Now accepts FileWritePort in addition to SchemaExporterPort so file-write side effects are handled inside the usecase boundary.

ReviewRoundType.docs: Usecase-layer enum mirroring domain::RoundType (Fast/Final). Used by RunReviewService and its interactor when converting the round_type string from RunReviewCommand to the domain type. The CLI passes round_type as a plain String so it never needs to import ReviewRoundType or domain::RoundType directly.

ReviewRoundTypeError.docs: thiserror-derived enum returned by ReviewRoundType::parse. Single variant InvalidValue(String) covers unrecognised round-type strings. Implements Deref<Target = str> for test assertions that use .contains() on the unwrapped message.

ReviewWorkflowError.docs: Error type for review workflow verdict serialization and validation. Serialize variant wraps serde_json::Error via #[from]; Validation carries a descriptive string.

ChainRunnerError.docs: Error returned by chain runner ports (AdrChainRunnerPort, SpecAdrChainRunnerPort, LayerChainRunnerPort). Represents a catastrophic infrastructure failure when executing a chain verifier (not a gate-level pass/fail, which is represented in SignalChainOutput::passed). Derives Clone in addition to Debug/Display/Error.

CodeFragmentExtractorError.docs: Error returned by CodeFragmentExtractorPort::extract. Single variant ExtractionFailed(String) encapsulates infrastructure-level extraction failures at the usecase boundary.

DiffBaseResolverError.docs: Error returned by DiffBaseResolverPort::resolve_diff_base. Single variant Unavailable(String) signals that the diff-base commit cannot be resolved. Derives Clone.

DryCheckSharedError.docs: Error returned by the fragment_ref_of free function. Two variants: InvalidContentHash signals a hash computation failure; InvalidSourcePath signals that the source path cannot be converted to a valid string.

DryCorpusMetaError.docs: Error returned by DryCorpusMetaPort::resolve_corpus_meta. Single variant Unavailable(String) signals that corpus metadata cannot be resolved. Derives Clone.

PrGhApiError.docs: Error type for GitHub API calls within the PR review polling usecase. Single variant ApiFailure(String) encapsulates gh CLI or HTTP-level failures.

PrRepoNwoError.docs: Error type for repository NWO resolution failures. Single variant Unavailable(String) signals that the repository owner/name cannot be resolved.

ReviewAuxError.docs: Error type for auxiliary review operations that return Result: classify, files, results, validate-scope, and get-briefing. Single variant Failed(String) encapsulates any operation-level failure; run-local reports status through ReviewRunLocalOutput instead.

SchemaExporterError.docs: Error returned by SchemaExporterPort::export_as_json. Single variant ExportFailed(String) signals that crate JSON schema export failed.

ShellParserError.docs: Error returned by ShellParserPort::split_shell. Single variant ParseFailed(String) signals that POSIX shell token splitting failed.

VerifyPortError.docs: Error returned by VerifyPort methods that can fail structurally (adapter-level failures distinct from verify findings). Findings are encoded inside VerifyOutcome via exit_code; Err is reserved for I/O / setup failures. Single variant Unavailable(String) carries adapter-level diagnostic.

SignalGateService.docs: Application service (primary port) for the signal-gate chain sequencing use case. Implementations sequence the 4 SoT chains and aggregate outcomes. Extracted from cli_composition signal_check_gate per ADR 1328 D4.

SpecAdrSignalService.docs: Application service (primary port) for the spec-ADR signal calculation and persistence use case. Runs the read-domain-document->evaluate->set->write-domain-document cycle; JSON decode/encode stays behind the SpecFileWriterPort adapter boundary. Extracted from cli_composition signal_calc_spec_adr per ADR 1328 D4.

ArchivedTrackTelemetryService.docs: Application service (primary port) for archived-track telemetry emission. cli_driver invokes this usecase service; the interactor delegates persistence through ArchivedTrackTelemetryPort so the secondary adapter stays behind the usecase boundary.

DryFragmentPipelineService.docs: Application service (primary port) for D4 diff-fragment pipeline extraction. Covers the build_current_fragment_refs multi-step orchestration moved out of cli_composition by T007. The dry_check_approved code path retains only a small one-line loop that calls the usecase free function `fragment_ref_of` per fragment — that is a single-step usecase API call, not multi-step orchestration, and remains in cli_composition by design. The broader dry-gate orchestration in fixpoint_resolve is tracked by T008. dry_write record-count aggregation stays in the dry-write path; DryFragmentPipelineOutput records_* counters remain 0 for catalogue compatibility.

FixpointDryGateService.docs: Application service (primary port) for D4 fixpoint-resolve dry-gate orchestration. Owns the dry-gate branch and related application sequencing moved out of cli_composition by T008.

PrReviewPollingService.docs: Application service (primary port) for D4 PR review polling. Extracts the polling loop from cli_composition so cli_driver invokes a single usecase service.

SpecFileWriterPort.docs: Secondary port for reading and atomically writing spec.json files. Operates on domain::SpecDocument — the infrastructure adapter performs JSON codec internally (decode on read, encode + atomic write on write). This keeps the usecase interactor free of serde_json and infrastructure::spec::codec. Decode/Encode error variants on SpecAdrSignalError are returned by the adapter when codec fails.

ReviewGateStatePort.docs: Baseline port referenced so that FsReviewGateStateAdapter -.impl.-> ReviewGateStatePort edge is visible in the contract-map (R7).

RefVerifyGateStatePort.docs: Baseline port referenced so that FsRefVerifyGateStateAdapter -.impl.-> RefVerifyGateStatePort edge is visible in the contract-map (R7).

DryCheckAgentPort.docs: Baseline port referenced so that RecordingDryAgent -.impl.-> DryCheckAgentPort edge is visible in the contract-map (R7).

DryCheckApprovalService.docs: Baseline service port referenced so that NoOpDryApprovalService -.impl.-> DryCheckApprovalService edge is visible in the contract-map (R7).

SemanticIndexPort.docs: Baseline port referenced so that NullInsertIndexProxy -.impl.-> SemanticIndexPort and NoopSemanticIndexPort -.impl.-> SemanticIndexPort edges are visible in the contract-map (R7).

BranchReaderPort.docs: Baseline port referenced so that the LazyBranchReader delete entry is traceable in the contract-map (R7). LazyBranchReader is eliminated; SystemGitRepo directly implements this port.

ArchivedTrackTelemetryPort.docs: Secondary port for emitting a telemetry event when an archived-track subcommand is dispatched. Abstracts the direct std::fs / serde_json / chrono I/O that previously lived in apps/cli/src/main.rs:247-294. The infrastructure adapter owns timestamp capture and receives the telemetry directory at construction.

AdrChainRunnerPort.docs: Secondary port for chain ⓪ (ADR → user): runs the ADR signal scan for a given project root and strictness setting, returning a chain output. The infrastructure adapter runs execute_verify_adr_signals_with_strict internally; the port exposes only the rendered text outcome.

SpecAdrChainRunnerPort.docs: Secondary port for chain ① (spec → ADR): reads and evaluates the spec.json signal gate with the resolved strictness, returning a chain output. The infrastructure adapter runs verify_from_spec_json + resolve_trusted_root internally; the port exposes only the rendered text outcome.

LayerChainRunnerPort.docs: Secondary port for chains ② and ③ (catalog-spec / impl-catalog): runs the argless layer-chain verifier for a given chain label and per-layer parameters. Abstracts signal_check_layer_chain_with_strict composition so the interactor can sequence all four chains without importing infrastructure.

CodeFragmentExtractorPort.docs: Secondary port for extracting code fragments from a workspace root. Abstracts infrastructure::semantic_dup::extractor::extract_code_fragments so the DryFragmentPipelineInteractor does not import from infrastructure directly. The infrastructure adapter (CodeFragmentExtractorAdapter) wraps extract_code_fragments and maps ExtractError to CodeFragmentExtractorError at the boundary.

SleepPort.docs: Secondary port abstracting thread::sleep. Allows the PrReviewPollingInteractor to be tested with a mock that records sleep calls rather than blocking, keeping the usecase layer free of thread::sleep (which belongs in infrastructure).

PrListReviewsPort.docs: Secondary port for listing GitHub PR reviews. Abstracts GhClient::list_reviews so the PrReviewPollingInteractor does not import from infrastructure directly. Returns raw JSON string.

PrListReactionsPort.docs: Secondary port for listing GitHub PR reactions (zero-findings detection via +1 reactions).

PrListIssueCommentsPort.docs: Secondary port for listing GitHub PR issue comments (bot activity detection and zero-findings comment fallback).

DiffBaseResolverPort.docs: Secondary port for resolving the dry-check diff-base commit for a track. Abstracts the filesystem + git logic that reads the per-track .commit_hash file with a fallback to git rev-parse main, keeping the usecase interactor free of std::fs and std::env.

DryCorpusMetaPort.docs: Secondary port for resolving the corpus workspace root and current corpus fingerprint given the track's dry-check-corpus-root.json manifest state. Abstracts std::fs::symlink_metadata and corpus fingerprint computation, keeping the usecase interactor free of std::fs.

PrRepoNwoPort.docs: Auxiliary PR polling secondary port for repository NWO resolution. Production pre-resolves repo_nwo in the composition layer and passes it on PrReviewPollingCommand, so this port is not injected into PrReviewPollingInteractor.

DryApprovalFactoryPort.docs: Secondary port that constructs a DryCheckApprovalService from resolved corpus metadata and configuration, keeping infrastructure adapter construction (FsDryCheckStore, FsDryCheckCoverageAdapter) out of the usecase interactor (CN-02 / CN-07).

DryCheckDiffSource.docs: Dry-check secondary port for diff hunk listing. T007 modified signature to add `repo_root: &Path` parameter (was previously CWD-dependent via SystemGitRepo::discover()). The adapter now uses SystemGitRepo::discover_from(repo_root) explicitly, removing ambient CWD dependency from the usecase orchestration boundary.

HookDispatchService.docs: Application service trait for the hook dispatch use case. Dispatches to the appropriate HookHandler and returns HookVerdictOutput so the CLI never imports domain::hook types directly.

VerifyPort.docs: Secondary port for all verify subcommands. Infrastructure implements this port by delegating to the infrastructure::verify::* submodules.

ConventionsPort.docs: Secondary port for convention document management.

DemoPort.docs: Secondary port for the built-in demo.

DemoService.docs: Application service trait for the demo use case.

FileWritePort.docs: Secondary port for atomic file write operations.

ArchPort.docs: Secondary port for workspace architecture rendering. Methods return rendered strings for direct presentation by cli_driver.

DryDriverPort.docs: Secondary port for dry command-family external effects used by DryDriverService. Any bridge implementation that delegates to DryCompositionRoot / DryFixRunnerCompositionRoot is transitional only; T023 must replace it with a non-root usecase/infrastructure path or remove the indirection before T024 deletes those originals.

DryDriverService.docs: Application service trait for the dry command family.

SemanticDupDriverPort.docs: Secondary port for semantic_dup command-family external effects used by SemanticDupDriverService. Any bridge implementation that delegates to SemanticDupCompositionRoot is transitional only; T023 must replace it with a non-root usecase/infrastructure path or remove the indirection before T024 deletes that original.

SemanticDupDriverService.docs: Application service trait for the semantic_dup command family.

SignalService.docs: Primary port for the signal command family. Each method corresponds to one sotp signal <subcommand> invocation.

TelemetryEmitDynamicPort.docs: Secondary port for emitting archived-track telemetry with dynamic path resolution. Accepts the full context at call time so the driver does not need to know the repo root at construction time. emit_archived now returns Result<(), TelemetryEmitDynamicPortError> (refactored from Result<(), String> by T026).

TelemetryReportPort.docs: Secondary port for aggregating telemetry JSONL data for a track. items_dir is passed per-call so the same port implementation can serve multiple track items directories.

TelemetryAggregateService.docs: Driver-facing aggregate/application service for the telemetry command family. Composes the TelemetryReportPort-based aggregation path with archived telemetry emission so TelemetryDriver holds one Arc<dyn TelemetryAggregateService>. report returns Result<String, TelemetryAggregateServiceError> as the rendered telemetry report string. emit_archived returns Result<(), TelemetryAggregateServiceError>.

PrCommandService.docs: Application service (primary port) for the PR command family. Covers all non-polling operations.

RefVerifyCheckApprovedService.docs: Primary port for the ref-verify check-approved use case.

RefVerifyRunService.docs: Secondary port implemented by infrastructure for the ref-verify run subcommand. It remains the filesystem-side contract in T023; composition may wrap it with a usecase interactor before injecting a driver-facing object.

RefVerifyCheckApprovedDriverService.docs: Secondary port implemented by infrastructure for the ref-verify check-approved subcommand. It remains the filesystem-side contract in T023; composition may wrap it with a usecase interactor before injecting a driver-facing object.

RefVerifyAggregateService.docs: Aggregate secondary port for the ref_verify command family. Infrastructure provides the filesystem-backed adapter that implements this service, allowing composition to inject the adapter through the secondary-port contract without misclassifying infrastructure as an application service.

ReviewService.docs: Aggregate primary port for the review command family. ReviewDriver holds exactly one Arc<dyn ReviewService>.

ReviewClassifyService.docs: Application service (primary port) for sotp review classify.

ReviewFilesService.docs: Application service (primary port) for sotp review files.

ReviewResultsService.docs: Application service (primary port) for sotp review results.

ReviewValidateScopeService.docs: Application service (primary port) for sotp review validate-scope.

ReviewGetBriefingService.docs: Application service (primary port) for sotp review get-briefing.

ReviewRunLocalService.docs: Application service (primary port) for sotp review local (provider-resolved).

TrackService.docs: Primary port for the track command family. Each method corresponds to one sotp track <subcommand> invocation.

GitWorkflowService.docs: Secondary port for guarded local git operations. T026 replaces the old Result<T, String> boundary with Result<T, GitWorkflowError>. FsGitWorkflowAdapter implements this contract; GitWorkflowInteractor wraps it at composition time.

SchemaExporterPort.docs: Secondary port for exporting a crate's public API as a JSON schema string. Abstracts the cargo rustdoc / nightly invocation from the ExportSchemaInteractor.

ShellParserPort.docs: Secondary port for POSIX shell token splitting. Abstracts shellwords or equivalent parsing from the GuardCheckInteractor, keeping the usecase layer free of shell-parsing infrastructure.

usecase::dry_check::shared::fragment_ref.docs: Computes a FragmentRef (content-hash-keyed reference) for the given CodeFragment. Returns DryCheckSharedError::InvalidContentHash if the hash cannot be computed, or DryCheckSharedError::InvalidSourcePath if the source path cannot be converted to a UTF-8 string.

params.name: ensure_fn
params.ty: std::sync::Arc<dyn Fn(Option<String>, String) -> PrCommandOutput + Send + Sync>

params.name: wait_and_merge_fn
params.ty: std::sync::Arc<dyn Fn(String, u64, u64, String) -> PrCommandOutput + Send + Sync>

params.name: poll_review_fn
params.ty: std::sync::Arc<dyn Fn(String, String, u64, u64) -> PrCommandOutput + Send + Sync>

params.name: review_cycle_fn
params.ty: std::sync::Arc<dyn Fn(Option<String>, bool) -> PrCommandOutput + Send + Sync>

params.name: run_fn
params.ty: std::sync::Arc<dyn Fn(Vec<String>, Option<String>, std::path::PathBuf) -> Result<Vec<(String, String)>, ReviewAuxError> + Send + Sync>

params.name: run_fn
params.ty: std::sync::Arc<dyn Fn(String, Option<String>, std::path::PathBuf) -> Result<Vec<String>, ReviewAuxError> + Send + Sync>

params.name: run_fn
params.ty: std::sync::Arc<dyn Fn(String, Option<String>, std::path::PathBuf) -> Result<Option<String>, ReviewAuxError> + Send + Sync>

params.name: run_fn
